problem id: 5e0b85b0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) XOR NOT SHL(2)) OR SHR(4)

examples:
  01010011 -> 11011101
  10110100 -> 10111011
  10111011 -> 01101111
  01111110 -> 11001111
  11000010 -> 10101111
  11100110 -> 10111111
  11101111 -> 10111110
  11001001 -> 11101110

query: 11111010
predicted answer: 01001111
